title: dryopteris orbicularis
intro: Dryopteris orbicularis, also known as the moon fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and has also been shown to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Dryopteris orbicularis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
